text_excerpt: Contact Me – Paul Davies MP Skip to content Facebook About Me News Speeches In Parliament In the Constituency Tackling Loneliness Literacy in Prisons Contact Me Office Standards Statement Privacy Policy Contact Me Need to get in touch with me? You can reach out to me through the following means: paul.davies.mp@parliament.uk House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA 01484 598600 Whether it’s a concern that you have been treated unfairly, a local issue or to ask a policy question, your voice matters! There is a strict parliamentary protocol which dictates that MPs may only represent their constituents, so please check first by entering your postcode here . Please provide as many details as possible, including your name, address and full details of your issue If you are contacting me on behalf of someone else, I will only be able to help if you have permission from that person. This permission should be given in writing. I look forward to hearing from you. Email me Instagram Facebook Emergency Numbers Emergency Servic es : Immediate danger, for police fire services or medical emergencies call 999 For non emergencies call 101 For non-life-threatening emergencies, needing medical help or immediate medical advice call 111 Kirklees Council: Council housing repairs – out of hours council repairs 01484 414850 Pinnacle Housing out of hours repairs 0330 036 1517 Housing, homelessness, and financial hardship homelessness (in hours) 01484 221350 & homelessness (out of hours) 01484 414933 , benefits (local welfare provision) 01484 414782 council vulnerable tenant 01484 414886 Abuse and domestic violence child abuse and domestic violence (in hours) 01484 456848 , child abuse (out of hours) 01484 414933 Pennine Domestic Violence Group 0800 0527222 National Domestic Violence Helpline 0808 2000 247 ·Roads, weather and emergency events flooding (Kirklees Council hotlines) 01484 414700 (8am-6pm) & 01484 414888 (6pm-8am) flooding (Environment Agency hotline) 0345 988 1188 road emergencies 01484 414700 severe weather damage 01484 414888 noise 01484 414828 ·Social care adults social care (24hrs) 01484 414933 children social care (in hours) 01484 456848 children social care (emergency out of hours) 999 Utility : Northern Gas 0800 111 999 Northern Power Grid 0800 375 675 or 105 in the event of a powercut Yorkshire Water (in hours) report a problem online https://tell-us.yorkshirewater.com/ & Yorkshire Water (out of hours) 0345 1242 424 Privacy policy Loading Comments...
